---
title: "Interactive Apps"
subtitle: "Explore mathematical concepts through interactive visualizations"
listing:
  contents:
    - buffons-needle.qmd
    - estimating-pi.qmd
    - gibbs-sampling.qmd
    - metropolis-hastings.qmd
    - metropolis-random-walk.qmd
    - random-walks-on-graphs.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, date, title, description]
  # categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: 250px
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
toc: false
---
